description: Format the raw academic manuscript at ~/Documents/TextDocuments/manuscript_raw.docx into a standardized layout. Set the title ('Atmospheric Escape and Evolution...') to 16pt, Bold, and Center aligned. Format the abstract ('We present a comprehensive model...') to 10pt, Italic, and Justified. Set the four main headings (e.g., '1. Introduction', '2. Methodology') to 14pt, Bold, and Left aligned, and the main body paragraphs to Justified alignment. Convert the comma-separated data under 'Table 1 Data:' into a table with columns for Planet, Mass, Radius, and Equilibrium Temp. Save the formatted document to ~/Documents/TextDocuments/typeset_manuscript.docx.
